label: communities derived from signed node proof_snapshot.region (community_id = IN_<pincode>); reporters and DHT-seen peers alike; bests are the highest verified signed result produced in that community

extra.method: sequential memcpy for bandwidth; dependent pointer chase over a buffer larger than cache for latency

extra.iops_caveat: 4 KiB random reads against a file just written, so the page cache is warm; this measures the filesystem path, not a cold device
